title: Millionfold v0.1.4 Null-Safety Crash Fix
content:
Millionfold has been updated to v0.1.4 to resolve a critical UI crash when processing large numbers of files.

Key additions:

  • Path Parsing Null-Safety: Added guards to prevent TypeError when splitting image destinations/sources on files that fail to process.
  • React Render Resilience: Prevents unhandled exceptions in the live feed preview and grid history components from unmounting the React virtual DOM tree, avoiding blank screens during large batch runs.
